system.description: Eclipse improves the character’s low light vision. Any penalties associated with darkness are removed. Continued use is hard on the eyes. Each time a dose is taken, the character must make an Endurance save. Each failure means his vision is being damaged, applying a penalty to actions requiring sight equal to the number of failures, to a max of -4d, at which point the character is blind. This penalty can be removed temporarily by taking another dose. The effects last for 1 Quarter.
